---
title: "Julia Chevan, PT, DPT, PhD, MPH"
about:
  template: solana
  image: images/JuliaChevan.png
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3044-4070
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/julia-chevan-78792ba/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jchevan@springfieldcollege.edu
---

I am a physical therapist, health services researcher, and public health practitioner with 30 years of experience at the intersection of academia, rehabilitation, implementation science, and chronic disease prevention. 

Currently I serve as Senior Program Manager with the National Association of Chronic Disease Directors. My day-to-day work focuses on building the evidence for clinical-community partnerships that improve outcomes for people living with arthritis, fall risk, and other chronic conditions. In July 2025, I will be joining the Clinical Research PhD Program at the University of Jamestown as faculty.

To learn more about building your Quarto website visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
